GOVERNANCE CIRCUIT BREAKER TRIPPED — score 10/100. All changes are paused until operator resets the breaker.

Suggested recovery path (CAVEAT: system is in degraded state — verify suggestions independently before acting):
No specific degradation source identified. Try resetting the circuit breaker with 'reset circuit breaker' and monitor.
Final step: Reset the circuit breaker with 'reset circuit breaker' once root cause is addressed.

To reset: use 'reset circuit breaker' command.
